records.question: Which projects named A Puzzling Parallax have assigned team members?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
WHERE projects.name = 'A Puzzling Parallax'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT projects.code
FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
WHERE projects.name = 'A Puzzling Parallax'

records.question: Which projects named Winds: Studying Bernoullis Principle involve Michael Rogers and require at most 156 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
JOIN scientists ON assignedto.scientist = scientists.ssn
WHERE scientists.name = 'Michael Rogers' AND projects.hours <= 156 AND projects.name = 'Winds: Studying Bernoullis Principle'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.code
FROM projects p
JOIN assignedto a ON p.code = a.project
JOIN scientists s ON a.scientist = s.ssn
WHERE p.hours <= 156
  AND p.name = 'Winds: Studying Bernoullis Principle'
  AND s.name = 'Michael Rogers'

records.question: Which projects require exactly 789 hours and involve the scientist where name is George ODonnell?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects

JOIN scientists ON assignedto.scientist = scientists.ssn
WHERE projects.hours = 789 AND scientists.name = 'George ODonnell'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.code
FROM projects p
JOIN assignedto a ON p.code = a.project
JOIN scientists s ON a.scientist = s.ssn
WHERE p.hours = 789
  AND s.name = 'George ODonnell'

records.question: Which projects named Juicy: Extracting Apple Juice with Pectinase, assigned to Mary-Anne Foster, require at most 321 hours?

JOIN scientists s ON a.scientist = s.ssn

  AND p.name = 'Juicy: Extracting Apple Juice with Pectinase'
  AND s.name = 'Mary-Anne Foster'
